titlestmt.titleproper: Pi Alpha Xi, Cornell Chapter records37-6-3492
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-12-18 18:24:41 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Pi Alpha Xi, Cornell Chapter records
did.physdesc: Minutes, by-laws, publications, photographs, plaque, and scrapbooks
did.abstract: Includes minutes of meetings, by-laws, publications, photographs, plaque, and scrapbooks of the Cornell Chapter.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes minutes of meetings, by-laws, publications, photographs, plaque, and scrapbooks of the Cornell Chapter.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Pi Alpha Xi, Cornell Chapter records, #37-6-3492. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Ornamental horticulture -- Societies, etc.
controlaccess.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences -- : Societies, etc.

did.unittitle: Minutes: Alpha Chapter Pi Alpha Xi
Secretary's Book of the Floriculture Club of Cornell
Course 115-Physiology and Biochemistry of organ Formation and Growth
A. M. S. Pridham: Papers and Articles
Pridham: Projects, Surveys, Reports; "A Letter to Young Farmers"
Pridham: Projects, Surveys, Reports, Soil Map of Orleans County, NY
New York State Nurserymen's Association-Constitution, Bylaws
NYS Nurserymen's Association-Miscellaneous Reports, Notes, Correspondence
Ritual of Pi Alpha Xi, Initiation Ceremony-Constitution, Original Signed Copy, Contains Names of Charter Members
Report of Ways and Means Committee on Alumni Finances
Uncollectible Accounts and Transfers to Other Chapters
New York State Cemetery Association Award
Herman R. Schenkel, Sr. Memorial Award
Joseph J. Yedowitz, Sr. Memorial Award
Pridham Materials: Film, Program, Map of Cambridge (UK)
"Home Grounds: Their Planning and Planting" Text Prepared by L. H. Bailey
"What is Horticulture?" By Prof. L. H. Bailey
"Words Said About A Birthday" Delivered at Cornell University
"My Great Oak Tree and Other Poems" By L. H. Bailey
Pre-Cornell and Early Cornell IV; Biology at Cornell University 1868-1928
"A Century of Growth" Meadow Brook Nurseries, 1845-1945
Ritual of Pi Alpha Xi-Chaplain's Copy
Pi Alpha Xi Freshman Award Plaque
